# transliterateChinese(forText:)

**Instance Method**

Converts the text between traditional and simplified Chinese.

## Declaration

```swift
func transliterateChinese(forText text: String)
```

## Parameters

- **text**: The text to transliterate.

## Overview

Call this method to get the operating system’s standard transliteration, for example, when your browser text view receives [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEResponderEditActions/transliterateChinese(_:)].

## Translation and transliteration

- **translate(text:from:)**: Presents a translation of the text.
